name: Proud Tom Turkey
subject: animals/turkey
prompt: a proud male turkey standing tall and facing forward, a big wide fan of tall tail feathers spread out behind him, a rounded body, a bumpy wattle hanging under his beak, and a cheerful expression

name: Thanksgiving Turkey
subject: animals/turkey
prompt: a plump cheerful Thanksgiving turkey wearing a small pilgrim hat, a fanned tail of feathers behind it, round friendly eyes, a wattle under its beak, and little feet, with a couple of autumn leaves at its feet

name: Cute Baby Poult
subject: animals/turkey
prompt: a tiny fluffy baby turkey poult with a round chubby body, big sparkly eyes, a few soft feathers, short little legs, and a sweet smile, simple and chunky for very young children

name: Wild Turkey in the Woods
subject: animals/turkey
prompt: a wild turkey walking through the forest in profile, a slender body with long legs, a small head with a snood and wattle, a partly raised tail, with tall grass, a tree trunk, and a few ferns around it

name: Strutting Turkey
subject: animals/turkey
prompt: a turkey strutting and showing off in side profile, chest puffed out, one wing dropped low toward the ground, a fully fanned tail held upright, head held high with a long dangling snood over the beak

name: Turkey Close-Up Portrait
subject: animals/turkey
prompt: a close-up head-and-shoulders portrait of a turkey, showing the bumpy textured skin of the head and neck, a curved beak, a soft snood hanging over the beak, a rounded wattle, and a bright friendly eye

name: Turkey Hen and Poults
subject: animals/turkey
prompt: a gentle mother turkey hen standing in a grassy field with three little fluffy poults gathered around her feet, the hen looking down at her chicks lovingly, a few blades of grass and a small flower

name: Hand Turkey
subject: animals/turkey
prompt: a classic hand-turkey shape where a traced open hand forms the bird, the thumb drawn as the head with a small beak and wattle, and the four fingers spread out as colorful tail feathers, simple and bold

name: Turkey on the Farm
subject: animals/turkey
prompt: a friendly turkey standing in a farmyard beside a wooden fence, a small barn in the background, scattered hay on the ground, and a couple of pecked corn kernels near its feet, a fanned tail behind it

name: Roosting Turkey in a Tree
subject: animals/turkey
prompt: a turkey perched on a sturdy tree branch at rest, body settled down with feathers tucked, tail folded, surrounded by leafy branches and a few stars in the night sky to show it is roosting

name: Gobbling Turkey
subject: animals/turkey
prompt: a funny turkey with its beak wide open mid-gobble, head tilted back and snood flopping, a stretched neck, a fanned tail behind, small motion lines near the beak to suggest a loud gobble sound

name: Fancy Patterned Turkey
subject: animals/turkey
prompt: an ornate decorative turkey with a large fanned tail where each feather is filled with detailed patterns like swirls, dots, and stripes, a patterned body, and curling accents, intricate for older kids to color
